(E)EPROM-Programmer V02.00 using BASIC-52

PUH-BrianMartell Theorem 92 (E₈ Lattice as Optimal Dynamic Foam Under Photon-Knot Tension — Viazovska Optimality Extended to Loaded Voronoi Partition in PUH v64) The E₈ root lattice realises the densest sphere packing in 8 dimensions (Viazovska 2016). Under continuous tension from SPF boundary pressure, rebound expansion and folded-photon internal pressure, the spheres deform into polyhedral Voronoi cells that share minimal surfaces. The resulting dynamic foam minimises total wall energy under actual loading; the migration of shared walls through the lattice is the gravitational field. The static E₈ optimum plus the dynamic correction ε(ρ_γ, T, P_SPF) reproduces the observed geometry of spacetime.
